results.rendered_html: N. of a river in the Dekhan (accord. to a legend [ Hariv. 1421 f. , 1761 f. ] daughter of Yuvanāśva and wife of Jahnu, changed by her father's curse from one half of the Gaṅgā into the river Kāverī, therefore also called Ardha-gaṅgā or -jāhnavī),  MBh. ;  Hariv. ;  R.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
kāverī
1 N. of a river in the south of India; kāverīṃ saritāṃ patyuḥ śaṃkanīyamivākarot  R. 4. 45. 
2 A harlot, courtezan.
3 Turmeric.
